title: Teams not visible/selectable in forms

posts.author: Sotiris (bootstraps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
We made a from to create new projects. But we would like to assign a team.
However it’s impossible to do because the teams are not shown in form view.
The teams can be found and selected in the normal table view.

Is there an easy way to fix this?
PS the option to restrict the people column to only teams or only members or selected members would be A-mazing!

Thanks for reading.,

Best

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

This is currently expected at this time - I apologise for the setback! Our team are working on supporting this in our next iteration, so please stay tuned
